prompt: I have some messy palettes in `palettes/terminal-colors`. Some are named inconsistently (e.g. `ayu_dark.json` vs `Ayu Mirage.json`). Can you clean up the folder structure, standardize the naming, and ensure they are all correctly indexed in `palettes.json`? Please provide a dry-run first.

assertions.text: Proposed plan includes renaming snake_case to Title Case
